title: The AI energy crisis will force radical innovation in sustainable power
description: ARTIFICIAL intelligence is transforming technology, but its swift rise brings growing costs. As companies accelerate AI development, the world edges closer to an AI energy crisis. This is not an issue limited to a handful of data-heavy industries or corporate IT departments. Its effects will extend across the global economy and the infrastructure that supports everyday digital services.
